description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure standing with hands on hips, exuding a confident and assertive posture. The figure has a defined facial structure with short, textured hair and a neutral expression. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top that transitions from a bright upper section to a darker lower section, paired with tight, dark pants that extend to the feet. The proportions are slightly exaggerated, with broad shoulders and a narrow waist, giving the figure a heroic or athletic appearance. The surface finish is matte, with minimal textural detail, and the overall form is smooth and simplified. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's stance suggests readiness or alertness.
description: A stylized adult male figure stands confidently with hands on hips, wearing a fitted long-sleeve top and tight pants. The figure has a smooth, matte finish and a simplified, athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the confident stance, facial features, and the fitted top with hands on hips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the arm bent at the waist.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the arms akimbo, emphasizing the figure's posture.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face and body, mirroring the left side with similar arm positioning.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve athletic top and tight pants
